meaning: n.推销员,(贿赂事件的)中间人
examples: It's another open and shut, though - Bagman.
He looked more than ever like a prosperous bagman.
The bagman that works for you is more, gain profit more.
Before the local poll monitoring committee, the bagman was forced to admit he was dropped in the area with some eight million rupiah to hand out.
On the 15th fairway, the bagman was heard recalling Phil Mickelson's faux pas on the last occasion the Walker Cup was played in the Emerald Isle at Portmarnock in 1991.
